title: This Indicator Tells You Exactly When to ENTER & EXIT Trades!
thesis_bullets: It gives you impulse signal where the momentum is suddenly increasing and a breakout is probably going to happen.
This is one of the best indicators on trading view for scalping strategies and day trading strategies.
So it's suitable for timeframes like 1 minute, 5 minutes, 15 minutes up to 1 hour.

This indicator can be used for any type of trading strategies whether it is trend following strategy, reversal strategy or breakout trading strategy because it gives you a signal when there is a sudden increase of momentum in the market.
Alright on trading view platform here we click on indicators and we search BB impulse indicator this one which is written by lazybear.
Alright this is the indicator and as you can see it is added here below the chart.

As you can see we have a histogram and the bars are sometimes above the center line and sometimes below the center line with different colors as you can see this indicator is built based on Bollinger bands and it is created by John Bollinger who's the one created the Bollinger bands.

If we go to the settings of the indicator you can see that we have settings for length and multiplier similar to Bollinger bands and similarly by default the length is set at 20 and the multiplier is set at 2.
We don't change this because this is optimized for most of trading strategies but here we have another two settings which are alert level which is set at 0.24 and impulse level which is set at 0.4.
Before I close the settings here we go to the style tab and here we change the histogram to columns so the bars will be better visible on the price chart.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.

hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
